author.bio:
Techie, app developer, self proclaimed foodie and 🥓 enthusiast. 
(Co-organizing @GDGTartu, founder, ex CEO & CTO @ Greenhouse CI, ex Skype for Android dev.)
author.name: Tauno Talimaa

content.text: I sit in a dark room and project code straight to my face while solving complicated problems. This helps me to immerse myself in it and "feel" the code. #BadStockPhotosOfMyJob
